solution.p: 3zq\lt38 is not linear because it multiplies two variables together.
q^{2}+y^{2}\geq30 and \pi r^{2}=48\pi are not linear because variables are raised to the second power.
\left|-7.3y-1\right|\leq34 is not linear because a variable is within absolute value bars.
That leaves 7x-4=-24 and y\sqrt{17}\geq-44\text{,} which are both linear.
